title: Logistics Executive
description:
*** working location at 601a Tanah Merah Coast Rd, Singapore 499865.

Responsibilities:

  • Responsible for receiving, storing and issuing of goods
  • Timely preparation of materials for project needs
  • Maintain updated and accuracy of inventories
  • Maintaining warehouse tidiness and perform housekeeping of warehouse from time to time
  • Participate in stock counts and reconciliation against ERP inventory
  • Monitor stock against agreed inventory levels and re-order as required
  • Ensure stock items have appropriate codes
  • Ensure full traceability of all stored materials/Items
  • Issue materials for Site/Project as required
  • Use stores requisition system and keep records
  • Use tooling control system
  • Handles various reports (as requested)
  • Report damage to incoming materials or equipment
  • Participate in audits on stores activities and other projects
  • Contribute to the compilation of stores operational procedures
  • Ensure PPE record is up to date
  • Monitor all Calibration tools & Equipment
  • Submit monthly reports for inventory, tools and Equipment
  • Abide to the Environmental, Safety and Health regulations (Internal & External)
  • Other duties as assigned from time to time

REQUIREMENTS:

  • Min GCE ‘O’ level
  • 2 Years experience at project Logistics is preferred
  • Candidate with effective Warehouse & Inventory Management Course Certificate is Preferred
  • Computer Literacy and knowledge in MS Office Excel Application
  • Able to lift heavy objects (up to 25kg) When required.
  • Able to work independently maintaining records and have a disciplined approach to data management and filing
  • Ability to take the initiative
  • Committed and dedicated to assigned duties by the company

postedCompany.description:
With a modest start-up as an electrical installer/sub-contractor in 1983, Concord has established a market reputation with its commitment in quality, on-schedule completion and guaranteed performance. We provide design engineering, procurement, project management, installation, test & commissioning, and maintenance for all spectrum of electrical and instrumentation projects in power distribution, signaling and communication system and have demonstrated our capability and commitment to meet customers’ requirements. Our key focus is in rail/transportation infrastructure, power, petrochemical and pharmaceutical plants. With more than 30-year of experience and continuous cultivation, we possess an invaluable asset of experienced and dedicated project management, engineers, technicians and skilled workforce with presence in Singapore, Malaysia, Dubai and Doha. The management principle is driven by our policy to consistently improve our service quality and to add value to our customers. We propel to expand our service span in engineering capability and to engage in manufacturing and system integration processes. We aim to be an integral part of our valued customers’ success. With constant innovation and belief in human development, good health, safety and environment, we aim to excel with excellent services and to continuously seek to be OUR CUSTOMERS’ PREFERRED PARTNER FOR A GUARANTEED PERFORMANCE.
